## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 lines.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Architecture Impact

- [ ] No architectural impact
- [ ] Affects CFA runtime behavior
- [ ] Affects architectural contract or terminology

If there is architectural impact, describe it briefly.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] Examples updated if needed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay close attention to.
